---
title: "focal_loss"
generated: true
description: "Binary focal loss of Lin et al. (2017) [1]_."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.classification`](../nitrix-metrics-classification.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:focal_loss -->
```python
focal_loss(logits: Float[Array, '...'], targets: Float[Array, '...'], *, gamma: float = 2.0, alpha: float = 0.25, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:focal_loss -->
Binary focal loss of Lin et al. (2017) [1]_.

The stable binary cross-entropy scaled by the focusing factor
$(1 - p_t)^{\gamma}$, where $p_t$ is the probability
assigned to the true class.  `gamma = 0` recovers the
(alpha-weighted) binary cross-entropy; larger `gamma` more
aggressively suppresses the loss of easy, confidently-correct
examples.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:focal_loss -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `logits` | `Float` | `...` | — | Pre-sigmoid scores. |
| `targets` | `Float` | `...` | — | Targets in `[0, 1]`, same shape as `logits`. |
| `gamma` | `float` | — | `2.0` | Focusing exponent (`>= 0`). Default `2`. |
| `alpha` | `float` | — | `0.25` | Class-balancing weight in `[0, 1]` applied to the positive class (`1 - alpha` to the negative). A negative value disables alpha-weighting (the unbalanced focal loss). Default `0.25`. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default), `"sum"`, or `"none"`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. Scalar loss (`"mean"` / `"sum"`) or the per-element loss with the shape of `logits` (`"none"`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:focal_loss -->
### References

.. [1] Lin, T.-Y., Goyal, P., Girshick, R., He, K., & Dollár, P.
   (2017). Focal loss for dense object detection. *Proceedings of the
   IEEE International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV)*, 2980-2988.
   `10.1109/ICCV.2017.324`
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:focal_loss -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
